ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "current_medication" TEXT /* Current medication of the patient */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score of the patient */,
  "cutoff_risk" REAL /* Cutoff risk score for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk assessment model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk assessment model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the risk assessment model */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the risk assessment model */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator of the risk assessment model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment model */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_assessment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being assessed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment model used */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "true_positive" INTEGER /* Number of true positives */,
  "true_negative" INTEGER /* Number of true negatives */,
  "false_positive" INTEGER /* Number of false positives */,
  "false_negative" INTEGER /* Number of false negatives */,
  "predicted_risk" REAL /* Predicted risk of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_assessment_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment model used */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics calculation */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the model */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity of the model */,
  "ppv" REAL /* Positive predictive value of the model */,
  "npv" REAL /* Negative predictive value of the model */,
  "pulmonary_complication_rate" REAL /* Pulmonary complication rate of the model */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area under the curve (AUC) of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_assessment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cutoff_risks" (
  "cutoff_risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cutoff risk score */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment model used */,
  "cutoff_risk" REAL /* Cutoff risk score */,
  "num_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients with this cutoff risk score */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the cutoff risk score was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cutoff_risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cutoff_risks_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_assessment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model update */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment model updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_updates_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_assessment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_assessment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient assessment status */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being assessed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment model used */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the patient's assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_assessment_status_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_assessment_status_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_assessment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment model */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_feedback_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_assessment_models ("model_id")
)
